query:
ALTER TABLE work_orders 
  MODIFY COLUMN priority VARCHAR(255),
  MODIFY COLUMN description VARCHAR(255),
  MODIFY COLUMN equipment_description VARCHAR(255),
  MODIFY COLUMN type VARCHAR(100),
  MODIFY COLUMN compliance_window_start_date VARCHAR(100),
  MODIFY COLUMN compliance_window_end_date VARCHAR(100),
  MODIFY COLUMN assigned_to_name VARCHAR(100),
  MODIFY COLUMN route VARCHAR(100),
  MODIFY COLUMN pm_code VARCHAR(100);
